**Deciding on strike announcement**

I need to determine if the document reveals a new upcoming strike. The content shows an HTML page titled "EAV Autolinee- Avviso di sciopero di 24 ore lunedì 24 febbraio 2025," which specifies a 24-hour national strike by USB set for February 24, 2025. It includes service hour guarantees and mentions reasons for the strike. This confirms it is indeed an announcement for a future strike, so I’ll extract the start and end dates in the required format.
